title: Free Drinking Water in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: Berlin has **over 240 free public drinking fountains** run by the Berliner Wasserbetriebe, active from **May to October**.
Hundreds of cafés and shops participate in **Refill Deutschland** — look for the blue sticker and get your bottle refilled for free, year-round.
The fountains run **continuously** (not on a button) to keep the water fresh. Quality is constantly monitored.
In winter (Nov–Apr), fountains are off. Use **Refill stations, hotel taps, or train station shops** instead.
A reusable bottle can save you **€5–10 per day** on water — money better spent on a döner.
